=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
Radio City Music Hall
New York City, New York
18 October 1988


received as a rip from audio CD of the bootleg "Old Men with Broken Teeth"
Very good sound

CD1

1 Subterranean Homesick Blues 2 Just Like A Woman 3 Masters Of War 4 Shelter From The Storm 5 Bob Dylan's 115th Dream 6 Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again 7 Gates Of Eden (acoustic) 8 With God On Our Side (acoustic) 9 Girl From The North Country (acoustic) 10 I Shall Be Released 11 Silvio 

CD2 

1 Like A Rolling Stone, 2 Wagoner's Lad (acoustic) 3 To Ramona (acoustic) 4 Knockin' On Heaven's Door (acoustic->electric) 5 In The Garden 6 All Along The Watchtower 7 


Filler 10/17/88 

I'll Remember You, 8 Ballad Of A Thin Man, 9 You're A Big Girl Now, 10 Highway 61 Revisited, 11 One Too Many Mornings, 12 Maggie's Farm
